CREATE TABLE hits (url String, from IPv4) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY url;
CREATE TABLE hits_v2 (url String, from IPv4) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY from;
SELECT toTypeName(from), hex(from) FROM hits LIMIT 5;
INSERT INTO hits (url, from) SELECT url, toIPv4('203.0.113.1') FROM another_table WHERE condition = true;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hits WHERE from BETWEEN '10.0.0.0' AND '10.255.255.255';
SELECT url FROM hits WHERE from IN (SELECT from FROM another_hits WHERE url LIKE '%.org');
SELECT DISTINCT from, COUNT(url) FROM hits GROUP BY from HAVING COUNT(url) > 1;
SELECT url, from FROM hits WHERE from = toIPv4('127.0.0.1') UNION SELECT url, from FROM hits_v2 WHERE from = '127.0.0.1';
SELECT url, hex(from) FROM hits WHERE from IN (SELECT DISTINCT from FROM hits WHERE url LIKE 'https://%') ORDER BY url;
SELECT url FROM hits WHERE from NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT from FROM hits WHERE from <> '192.168.0.1');
CREATE TABLE summary AS SELECT from, COUNT(*) as total_hits FROM hits GROUP BY from ORDER BY total_hits DESC;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(url) FROM hits) AS total_count SELECT url, total_count FROM hits WHERE from::UInt32 % 2 = 0;
